- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
	- Done: File created in .github.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
	- Done: Spring Boot Java backend with layered architecture confirmed.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
	- Done: Maven Spring Boot structure created in workspace root.

- [x] Customize the Project
	- Done: Layered package skeletons and main class added.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
	- Done: No extensions required.

- [x] Compile the Project
	- Done: Built successfully using Maven Central via .mvn/settings.xml.

- [x] Create and Run Task
	- Done: Not required; Maven commands are sufficient for build/run.

- [x] Launch the Project
	- Done: Application launched using Maven Central settings.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	- Done: README present and copilot instructions cleaned of HTML comments.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
